# clickfolio.me

Turn your PDF resume into a hosted web portfolio website in seconds. Upload your resume, and AI parses it into a professional website with a custom @handle URL — free forever.

## How It Works

1. Upload your PDF resume (no signup required)
2. AI parses your resume in ~30 seconds
3. Get a shareable website at `clickfolio.me/@yourhandle`
4. Edit anytime with auto-save, switch between 10 templates

## Features

- **10 Templates**: 6 free + 4 premium (unlockable via referrals)
- **Privacy Controls**: Toggle phone, address visibility
- **Custom @handle URLs**: `clickfolio.me/@yourname`
- **Full Editing Suite**: Inline editing, auto-save
- **AI-Powered Parsing**: Extracts experience, education, skills, projects
- **Free Forever**: All base features, no time limits

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://clickfolio.me
- Browse Portfolios: https://clickfolio.me/explore
- Privacy Policy: https://clickfolio.me/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://clickfolio.me/terms

## Tech Stack

Cloudflare Workers, D1 (SQLite), R2 storage, AI SDK, Better Auth
